name: view_metrics
description: Fetches and displays key performance metrics for a deployed application or service. This might involve using a platform-specific CLI command (e.g., related to 'flyctl metrics', Vercel analytics) or querying a monitoring service API.

project_path.description: Optional. The root directory path of the project, if needed by the metrics CLI or for context.

service_identifier.description: Identifier for the service whose metrics are being requested (e.g., Fly.io app name, Vercel project ID, Docker container ID).

metrics_source_type.description: Specifies the platform or type of metrics source.

metrics_queries.description: Optional list of specific metrics or queries to fetch (e.g., ["cpu_usage", "memory_usage", "http_requests_total"]). The interpretation depends on the metrics_source_type.

time_range_start.description: Optional start of the time range for metrics (ISO 8601 format).

time_range_end.description: Optional end of the time range for metrics (ISO 8601 format).

raw_cli_command.description: Optional. If metrics_source_type is 'generic_cli', this is the exact command to run to fetch metrics.
